records.m_Talk_ENG: All units! Swiftly secure the drop zone!
records.m_Talk_DEU: All units! Swiftly secure the drop zone!
records.m_Talk_FRA: All units! Swiftly secure the drop zone!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Place the armored units starting from the back. We will eliminate the enemy with long-ranged firepower!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Place the armored units starting from the back. We will eliminate the enemy with long-ranged firepower!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Place the armored units starting from the back. We will eliminate the enemy with long-ranged firepower!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Maze Commander! You're here!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Maze Commander! You're here!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Maze Commander! You're here!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Moneka! How are the coalition divisions?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Moneka! How are the coalition divisions?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Moneka! How are the coalition divisions?

records.m_Talk_ENG: The coalition divisions have successfully eliminated many Elite Members in the Curtain Call Operation.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The coalition divisions have successfully eliminated many Elite Members in the Curtain Call Operation.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The coalition divisions have successfully eliminated many Elite Members in the Curtain Call Operation.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But Maestra's return to Philharmonic Hall was earlier than expected, causing our forefront to scatter.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But Maestra's return to Philharmonic Hall was earlier than expected, causing our forefront to scatter.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But Maestra's return to Philharmonic Hall was earlier than expected, causing our forefront to scatter.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Accordingly, communication is currently impossible with personnel on the forefront.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Accordingly, communication is currently impossible with personnel on the forefront.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Accordingly, communication is currently impossible with personnel on the forefront.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Understood. The other divisions will follow suit in due course.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Understood. The other divisions will follow suit in due course.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Understood. The other divisions will follow suit in due course.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Send word to our comrades on the battlefield to hold on for a little longer.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Send word to our comrades on the battlefield to hold on for a little longer.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Send word to our comrades on the battlefield to hold on for a little longer.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Lastly, how are you doing, Alice?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Lastly, how are you doing, Alice?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Lastly, how are you doing, Alice?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Have you finished adjusting your gear?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Have you finished adjusting your gear?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Have you finished adjusting your gear?

records.m_Talk_ENG: No problems here, Maze Commander.
records.m_Talk_DEU: No problems here, Maze Commander.
records.m_Talk_FRA: No problems here, Maze Commander.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Just tell me when. I'm ready to deploy at any time.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Just tell me when. I'm ready to deploy at any time.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Just tell me when. I'm ready to deploy at any time.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Eep!! What do you mean, "No problem," you foolish cat!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Eep!! What do you mean, "No problem," you foolish cat!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Eep!! What do you mean, "No problem," you foolish cat!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Beast Claw is Unique Gear that was originally made for Commander Lionel!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Beast Claw is Unique Gear that was originally made for Commander Lionel!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Beast Claw is Unique Gear that was originally made for Commander Lionel!

records.m_Talk_ENG: No matter how much you adjust it, the risks are the same and the output is one fourth of the original!
records.m_Talk_DEU: No matter how much you adjust it, the risks are the same and the output is one fourth of the original!
records.m_Talk_FRA: No matter how much you adjust it, the risks are the same and the output is one fourth of the original!

records.m_Talk_ENG: This is the same as sprinting with shoes that don't fit!
records.m_Talk_DEU: This is the same as sprinting with shoes that don't fit!
records.m_Talk_FRA: This is the same as sprinting with shoes that don't fit!

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's okay. If I can sprint, I'll arrive faster than anyone.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's okay. If I can sprint, I'll arrive faster than anyone.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's okay. If I can sprint, I'll arrive faster than anyone.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ngh...! You're not listening to me! So stubborn!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ngh...! You're not listening to me! So stubborn!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ngh...! You're not listening to me! So stubborn!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Instead, I've prepared a suit that will synergize with your Counter ability to compensate for the shortage in output.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Instead, I've prepared a suit that will synergize with your Counter ability to compensate for the shortage in output.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Instead, I've prepared a suit that will synergize with your Counter ability to compensate for the shortage in output.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If you wear this suit, you'll be able to speed up more easily.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If you wear this suit, you'll be able to speed up more easily.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If you wear this suit, you'll be able to speed up more easily.

records.m_Talk_ENG: This is the suit? Why aren't you a clever short stack!
records.m_Talk_DEU: This is the suit? Why aren't you a clever short stack!
records.m_Talk_FRA: This is the suit? Why aren't you a clever short stack!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Anyway, thanks, kid. Wanna hug?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Anyway, thanks, kid. Wanna hug?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Anyway, thanks, kid. Wanna hug?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Uwaaagh...!! Get away from me! You smell like sweat...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Uwaaagh...!! Get away from me! You smell like sweat...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Uwaaagh...!! Get away from me! You smell like sweat...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ahem. Alice, don't forget.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ahem. Alice, don't forget.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ahem. Alice, don't forget.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You're currently here as Maze's backup.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You're currently here as Maze's backup.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You're currently here as Maze's backup.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I know you're anxious, but I hope you will prioritize my orders on the battlefield.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I know you're anxious, but I hope you will prioritize my orders on the battlefield.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I know you're anxious, but I hope you will prioritize my orders on the battlefield.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Understood, Commander.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Understood, Commander.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Understood, Commander.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Artillery Division Maze's basic strategy is to annihilate our enemies using ultra-long-range firepower.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Artillery Division Maze's basic strategy is to annihilate our enemies using ultra-long-range firepower.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Artillery Division Maze's basic strategy is to annihilate our enemies using ultra-long-range firepower.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But my division lacks close-range combatants.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But my division lacks close-range combatants.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But my division lacks close-range combatants.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I hope you can fill that hole for this operation.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I hope you can fill that hole for this operation.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I hope you can fill that hole for this operation.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Once the operation starts, you will secure the designated point, then wait for further orders.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Once the operation starts, you will secure the designated point, then wait for further orders.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Once the operation starts, you will secure the designated point, then wait for further orders.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Once our armored units secure their firepower, we'll open the way for you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Once our armored units secure their firepower, we'll open the way for you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Once our armored units secure their firepower, we'll open the way for you.
